projectDescription: A React-based personal portfolio website for Patrick Foster showcasing his work experience, software projects, blog, and contact information.
keyFeatures: Animated hero section with glitch-style heading text
Filterable work experience timeline with expand/collapse
Project showcase with image/video cards and external links
Blog section with individual article routing
Deployed via Netlify with client-side routing redirects
publicApiSurface: / — Home page with hero, experience, and projects
myProjects (constants/projects.js) — Array of project data objects
workExperience (constants/work.js) — Array of work experience entries
articles / getArticle (constants/articles.js) — Blog article index and lookup
